title: Marketplace Manager - Yatra Capital India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Yatra Capital India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Yatra Capital India family as a Marketplace Manager in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Yatra Capital India:
Yatra Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yatra Capital India!
